title: Wholesome Uruguayan Tomatoes Stew
description: A fresh, dense, one-pot stew featuring beef tomatoes, simmered on a comal with aromatic herbs.
instructions: Heat the comal over medium heat and drizzle olive oil.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add beef tomatoes, bay leaf, salt, and pepper; bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer the stew for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the bay leaf, stir in torn basil leaves, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, optionally with a slice of crusty bread or a side of rice.
Let the stew rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
